name: account-transaction
description: Portfolio.AccountTransaction tools on the ayunit MCP. Custody activity loaders (UBS Miami, Morgan Stanley, BTG Offshore/Cayman) parse the export/API feed and insert validated trades + cash/GL movements with live asset/account/lock resolution. Plus batch fixers: duplicate-trade-reconcile (removes restated/double-loaded trades against Portfolio.CustodyPosition, lock-aware) and compromissada-fix (normalises XP repos onto the cash-like convention, pair-consistent and lock-gated).
